claim: After the transfer namespace exists, transfer.py can move behind it while preserving the top-level module path through a compatibility alias.
mechanism: The transfer surface API already re-exported the public transfer functions from one module. Moving that module behind transfer_surface makes the seam real with a small blast radius, while the top-level alias preserves existing callers and monkeypatch paths.
boundary: This move does not relocate loop_controller.py or scoring_engine.py yet. Those transfer-adjacent modules still need their own dependency review.
